zh.Paignton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文派尼頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Coffin-Jackson於1563年9月29日出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親James Coffin26歲，母親Anne Mary Cole47歲。她於1567年6月16日與Richard Jackson在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1624年5月11日在英國英格蘭戴文派尼頓享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Coffin-Jackson was born on 29 September 1563, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Coffin, was 26 and her mother, Anne Mary Cole, was 47. She married Richard Jackson on 16 June 1567, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 11 May 1624, in Paignton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

ko.All Hallows the Less, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 앨 핼로스 테 그리트 앤드 앨 핼로스 테 레스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Coffin-Jackson(이)가 1563년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Coffin(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Mary Cole(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1567년 6월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Richard Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파익턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.All Hallows the Less, London, England: алл холлоус т грит анд алл холлоус т лесс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Coffin-Jackson родилась 29 сентября 1563 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Coffin было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Mary Cole, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Jackson 16 июня 1567 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 мая 1624 г. в местности пеигнтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
